education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering

education.institution: Monsignor Bonner & Archbishop Prendergast High School

bullets.text: Mentor 20 first year ECE engineering students in applied MATLAB and core ECE concepts
Provide hands-on technical guidance in lab environments including soldering (through-hole and SMD), embedded systems, and hardware debugging
Assist students in troubleshooting design challenges related to Sumobot projects and antenna builds
Strengthen student understanding of engineering workflows, problem-solving, and technical communication
Architected and developed a modular framework to evaluate trade-offs between FP32 and quantized models across accuracy, latency, and memory usage
Implemented automated benchmarking pipelines for PTQ, QAT, INT8, and FP8 quantization techniques on CNN and Transformer architectures
Designed system workflows to support both preloaded benchmark models and user-uploaded architectures for flexible evaluation
Conducted repeated hardware-level inference sampling to analyze performance on CPU environments
Evaluated accuracy degradation and model efficiency, demonstrating minimal accuracy loss (~<1%) while improving model size and inference performance
Collaborated in a 4-person engineering team using GitHub version control, code reviews, and structured sprint planning
Engineered a full-stack Android mobile application using Java/Kotlin and Android Studio for social drink sharing and discovery
Implemented Firebase Authentication and cloud data storage for secure login, user management, and real-time data updates
Designed and integrated a local persistence layer using RoomDB (SQLite) to support offline-first functionality and bidirectional data synchronization
Utilized Google Location Services API to enable venue-based check-ins and geolocation tagging for user-generated drink posts
Developed core application features including social connections, drink reviews, post creation, and location-based discovery
Structured and designed responsive UI components using XML layouts, optimizing navigation and overall user experience
Designed and deployed a PyTorch-based neural network pipeline for phishing email classification using 6,000+ labeled samples
Engineered preprocessing pipeline including text normalization, feature extraction, and stratified dataset splitting
Optimized neural network architecture and hyperparameters to achieve 99.36% test accuracy
Evaluated model performance with a focus on minimizing false positives in real-world detection scenarios
Applied supervised learning techniques and backpropagation to improve classification reliability and robustness
Process and validate daily concrete, masonry, and grout testing data using QESTLab software for quality assurance
Draft and finalize detailed field reports and grout documentation in accordance with project specifications
Coordinate with inspectors and project managers to ensure accuracy, compliance, and organized documentation workflows
Support inspection processes by maintaining structured records for project tracking and reporting
Operate a self-managed service business, demonstrating time management, client communication, and reliability
Manage scheduling, customer relationships, and service delivery independently
Developed and trained a neural network model to optimize circuit synthesis, integrating machine learning with electronic design automation workflows
Applied ABC logic synthesis tools to improve efficiency and performance of integrated circuit designs
Collaborated in a 4-person team to design and evaluate ML-driven optimization strategies for digital circuits
Contributed to bridging AI techniques with hardware-level engineering applications

leadership_and_activities.title: Handshake AI Fellowship
details: Selected for a competitive national program supporting students exploring AI and data-driven innovation.

leadership_and_activities.title: Villanova Phi Sigma Pi: Honor's Society
